name: JOROGUMO

abilities.name: Abyssal Hunger
abilities.text: When this model activates, it may kill an ally within 2" to gain a Fast token.

abilities.name: Eat Your Fill
abilities.text: After killing an enemy model with a (melee) action, this model heals 2.

abilities.name: Extended Reach
abilities.text: Enemy models within 2" cannot take attack actions generated by the Charge action.

triggers.name: Bloody Fate
triggers.text: Draw a card. If the target was not killed, discard a card.

triggers.name: Pick the Bones
triggers.text: After killing, this model may declare the Interact action after resolving the current action.

actions.name: Spider's Trance
actions.effects: The target gains a Stunned token.

triggers.name: Void Thread
triggers.text: Remove a friendly Rift marker within 2" of the target. Place this model into base contact with the target and declare a (melee) action.

actions.name: Bewitching Weave
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Move the target up to 4" toward either an ally or a model with a Stunned token.

extraction_notes: STN: 11 label appears below artwork, likely indicating station or strength value of 11
